case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. MAXIE, JEROME et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXIE, JEROME

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAXIE, JEROME THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH ST #435, STAYED UNTIL JUL-21-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT MAXIE, JEROME DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXIE, JEROME ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXIE, JEROME
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/CSR M.NORMAN/G.SHULL. DEFT ABSENTED HIM-S SELF FROM SETTLMNT CONF W/OUT NOTICE AFTER STATING THAT HE DID "NOT NEED TO BE HERE." DFT WAS UNLOCATABLE FOR OVER 15 MINUTES. COURT STRUCK JURY DEMAND AND EXCUSED PLTFF. DEFT RETURNED TO COURTROOM, WAS AGGRESSIVE/IRRATIONAL AND BAILIFF WAS CALLED. COURT TOOK BENCH TO EXPLAIN THAT JURY WAS NOW STRICKEN BUT HE SHOULD BE PRESENT FOR COURT TRIAL AS SET. DFT BECAME UPSET WHEN COURT WOULD NOT SPEAK TO HIM PRIVATELY AND BAILIFF WAS ASKED TO ASSIST DEFT IN LEAVING COURTROOM.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
